name: read_doc
description: Read any handle returned by search_docs or a previous read_doc reference. Returns the document, references, and tips for which references to read next.

detail.description: MCP response detail level. Defaults to compact; use full for a larger payload.

target.description: A docs://guide/..., docs://type/..., docs://member/..., URL, symbol id, or exact API symbol.

includeContent.description: Include guide markdown excerpts when reading guide pages. Defaults to true.

includeReferences.description: Include immediate references discovered from the target. Defaults to true.
